narrative:
Precinct Rush Township (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 546 registered voters, with 61.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
